per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: REA states that website articles may include embedded content, while REG-057 requires icons presented electronically to be machine-readable; these do not clearly express the same or directly conflicting constraint.

REA permits embedded content in articles, while REG-042 mandates that information be provided in writing or by other means including electronic means; the texts address different actions and objects, so no quote-supported mismatch is shown.

REA concerns embedded content in website articles, whereas REG-056 permits a data controller to provide information using standardised icons; the constraints are not clearly the same or directly conflicting.
